titleStmt.title: SII 18.89: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 89. (B.K. No. 75 of 1933-34.) SŌMĀPUR, NARGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the temple of Hanumān.

summary.p: This inscription which refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva and is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 5, Raudra, Mārgas11ira Pūrṇīmā, Sunday, lunar eclipse, refers to Yuvarāja Jayasiṁhadēva as ruling Banavāsi and other divisions, the details of the date correspond regularly to A.D. 1080, November 29, Sunday.

After giving the genealogy of the Chālukya family and an eulogistic account of Īs11varadēva, the rāyabhāri of the king, the record states that he established many water sheds, feeding centres and constructed a well, a tank and Śiva and Vishṇu temples. Further it records a grant of land made probably for the maintenance of these. The mahājanas of Mekkegēri of the agrahāra town Naugunda are highly praised.
The composer of the record and the person who corrected it are stated to be Mallikārjuna and Kollurava Nāgavāra, respectively.
The record is badly damaged at places.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallaba mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyaśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattṛbhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . © .
kaṁda . Osedu jagatrayamaṁ nirmmisida(ṁ) cāturmmukhavaṁśadoḷpuṭṭida sāhasigaṁ caḷukyanātanineseguṁ cāḷukyavaṁśamā vaṁśajaroḷ ©
kramadiṁde tailanuṁ sattimadēvaṁ vikramāṁkanayyaṇanurvvīramaṇaṁ jayasiṁha nṛpōttamanāhavamalladēvanā nṛpana sutaṁ ©
sōmēśvaraneṁbinibarumī mahiyaṁ sukhadināḷda tadanantaradoḷ śrīmaccaḷukya vaṁśalalāmaṁ traiḷōkyamallacakriya tanayaṁ ©
ballāḷtanadiṁ ripunṛparellamanēkāṁgadiṁdameṟagisi dharaṇīvallabhanādaṁ tṛbhuvanamallaṁ harimūrti vikramādityanṛpaṁ .
vṛtta . dhareyaṁ pūrvvābdhiyiṁ paścimajaḷadhivaraṁ sētuviṁ harmyaśaiḷaṁbaregaṁ nirvyā kuḷaṁ sādhisidatuḷabaḷaṁ pūṇdu rājēṁ
dracōḷāsuranaṁ nirmmūḷanaṁ māḍidaṁ ka yuvarājaṁ noḷaṁbādhirājaṁ berasuttaiśvaryyamaṁ bittarisidaṁ piriyaṁ rāyabeṁkoḷvadēvaṁ . ©
manadoṁdakkaraneyde dharmmasutaneṁtā bhīmasēnaṁge rāmanṛpaṁ lakṣmaṇavallabhaṁge meṟedaṁntī vikramādityadēvanumī lōkada mānavarppogaḷvinaṁ ko
ṇḍāḍidaṁ kūrttu vīranoḷaṁbavallabhanoḷatyāścaryasaundaryyama . Idiroḷsō mēśvaraṁ baṁdaḍase peṟage rājēṁdracōḷaṁ manaṁguṁdade cāturddanta
yuktaṁbare muḷidoḍaṁ bāydu rājēṁdranaṁ tūḷdida vīraṁ muṁde sōmēśvarano ḷaṟe beṁkoṁṇḍaṁ cāḷukyarājyāspadadoḷ śrīvikramādityana
nirisida vīraṁ noḷaṁbādhirāja . yuvarājaṁ tammanēṁ biḍu himanagadantirkke cāḷukya rāmaṁgavidhēyārātibhūpāḷaranuṟadiṟivāḷ kāryadāḷ khargga
doḷ vārddhivṛtōrvvīcakramaṁ sādhisida bavasiyoḷā ḷpallava lakṣmīlakṣitōrasthaḷananupamasauryyāvaḷaṁbaṁ vīranoḷaṁba . banavāside© These letters seem to have been engraved through
© svasti samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna lōkavikhyāta pallavānvaya śrīmahīvallabhaṁ yuvarāja rājaparamēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ vikra
mābharaṇaṁ jayalakṣmīramaṇaṁ saraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cāḷukyacūḍāmaṇi kadanatriṇētraṁ kṣatriyapavitraṁ mattagajāṁgarājaṁ sahaja
manōjaṁ ripurāyakaṭakasūṟekāṟanaṇnanaṁkakāṟa śrīmattrēḷokyamallavīranoḷaṁba pallavapermmāḍi jayasiṁhadēvar . banavāsidēsaṁ
modalene palavuṁ nāḍanāḷdu sukhadiṁdire bīranoḷaṁbadēvanā vīranoḷaṁba nṛpēṁdranāḷva lateṟada dhānyavarggada beḷasiṁgoḷvolanā
girppa beḷvalaneṁbā lalaneya tiḷakadavōlkaṇgoḷisuvudu mahāgrahāramene naṟugunda Ārayvodadaṟa nālkuṁ kērigaḷoḷagalligalliga
tiramaṇīyaṁ sāraṁ mūḍaṇabhāgada kēri śrī mekkegēriyeṁbudu pesariṁ mekkegēriyoḷvasudhāmararoḷagagragaṇyanūrjjitapuṇyaṁ
śrīmanmaṇḍeyavaṁśaśikhāmaṇiyene śaṁkapayyaneṁbaṁ negaḻdaṁ . [Ā śaṁkarana] kuḷāṁgane śrī siriguppeyara magaḷarundhati patigaṁ lēsu pati
bratikeyalu mahāsatiyene māḷikabbeyeṁbaḷpesariṁ . A va bāndhava niṣṭakavīṁdrabudhakaḷpamahījaṁ śivapādapadmabhṛṁgaṁvi
vēkanidhi rāyabhāri Īsaramayyaṁ . mānanidhānanīśvara rāṁgane puṇyamūrti caṁdrānane rannikabbe patibhakte mahāsati tattanūbhavar śrī
nidhi sadguṇa reṁba pogartteya sōvidēva permmānaḍi siṁgidēva sirivallabhareṁbavaruttamōttamar . mairūpu nālku tōḷiṁ surarājagajēṁdra
ve kōḍiṁ karamesevaṁtesedapanīśvaraṁ Avasaramintu yavasarakkiddu binnapadōjeyeṁdu binnavisi caḷu
kya traiḷōkyanoḷaṁbana cittadoḷmahōtsavamane māḍi tanneseva paḍedaṁ suhrijjanōtsavakaranīśvaraṁ negaṟdu vīranoḷaṁbana rā
yabhārama . puruśaguṇaṁgaḷillada yathē satkavibandhu sajjanābharaṇanidēṁ pavitra
nō dhanyanō noḷaṁbana rāyabhāri yīśvarane bhāvipoḍamentu pogaḷvaḍa mentu nōrppaḍa . puruṣanidhānaneṁba sujanapri
yaneṁbucitajñaneṁba sākṣaranidhiyeṁba dharmmanidhiyeṁba dayānidhiyeṁba satkavīśvara pogarttegellavaḷaneṁba noḷaṁbarāya
bhāri yīśvaranidēṁ cakriyaṁ manade goḷvare mattinarāyabhārigaḷ . kharakaraniṁdamaṁbuja vanaṁ śaśiyiṁdamṛtārṇnavaṁ nirantaramabhivṛddhi
yāganudinakramadiṁdame perccuvaṁdadiṁ parajanamoldu baṇnise caḷukya noḷaṁbana rāyabhāramīśvaraninudāttamādududitōditamāytu
caḷukyarājyadoḷ . parijanamarkkaṟiṁ pogaḷe vīranoḷaṁbana rājyalakṣmi vistarise caḷukya rāmana rāmanīye tanna vākpariṇatiyaṁ
jagake meṟedīśvaraneṁba mahātmanatyaḷaṁkarisidapaṁ noḷaṁba dharaṇīśa na rāya bhārama . sarasati tāyi sarōruhabhava janaka su
ramaṁtri satkaḷāguruvene kaltane karamēneṁbe noḷaṁbana rāyabhāri yīśvaranuḷidantu pēḷoḷare lōkada sākṣarariṁtu satkaḷāpariṇa
tariṁtu vākpaṭuviṁtu rasajñarumiṁtu sēvyaru . daṁdadiṁ koragutamirkke manyara
mukhaṁ darahāsaviḷāsamuttarōttarapuḷakaprasannamene vīranoḷaṁbana rāyabhāri yīśvarana mukhaprabhātasamayāṁbuja
danta ḻdoppitōruguṁ . nereda rasajñaroḷneṟe rasajñanudāttaroḷatyudāttana kkarigaroḷaggadakkariganuttamaroḷkaramuttamaṁ vidagdharoḷesa
kaṁ vidagdhanene bīranoḷaṁbana rāyabhāri yīśvarane samagra rātana kaltudanāro kaltavar . saradhiyoḷuḷḷa ratnamu
manaṁbaradoḷu neṟe nildu tārakōtkaramumanentu mā yyaṁ kaḍegāṇa gajjanābharaṇana puṇyabhājanana vīrano
ḷaṁbana rāyabāri yīśvarana guṇaṁgaḷaṁ neṟe vicārisi baṇnisalāro ballavar . Ī vasudhātaḷaṁ pogaḷvinaṁ naṟugundadoḷīśvaraṁ jagatpāvana
māge māḍisa nesediḻdavo sēvyamāgi nānāvidhamappa catravaṟavaṁṭige digghige sāle nandanaṁ bāvi taṭākamaggiṭageyā
rave viṣṇugrihaṁ śivālaya . Anitu dharmmakkaṁ modalene naṟugundada toḍavidene sakaḷajagajjanada pogarttege tāyvaneyenisugu
mīśvarasamudramati ramaṇīya . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnā nuṣṭhāṇapārāvārapārā
yaṇaraśēṣavaiśēṣikanayyāyikalōkāyatasāṁkhyabauddhamīmāṁsādyanēkatarkka śāstra pravīṇar rigyaju(r)ssā
mātharvvaṇaviditavēdāṁtaraṣṭādaśadharmā śaradabhravibhrājitaśaśāṁka śaṁkhagōkṣīradhārāpūra nī
hāraharahāra yaśōnnata vidyā viśiṣṭavidvāṁśajana pūjakar yajanayājanādhyaya
nādhyāpanadānapratigrahadharmmanirataranādi bhagavatīlabdhavaraprasādarappa śrīmanmahāgrahāraṁ
naṟugundada mekkegēriya mahājanaṁ mūvattayvarumiḻdu cāḷukyavikrama kālada 5 neya raudra saṁvatsarada mārgga
śirada puṇname Ādityavāramuṁ sōmagrahaṇada puṇyadinaṁ kūḍidandu śrīma ḷannoṁbadēvara rāyabhāri maṇḍe
yara [Īsapa]yyadaṇḍanāyakara sakāruṇyaṁ dravyapūrvvakadiṁ dhārā pūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvanamaśyama
ppantā mattaru ṭṭa mattar 36 . ka rmmūvattaya rssarvvamānyamappantire mūvattāṟu matta
raṁ kuḍaluttama navara kayya mēreyuṁ . tanna keṟegīśvaraṁ koṭṭarnne ṟe kaṁcipana keṟeya baḍagalmattarppanneraḍaṁ
pannirvvargannani voladoḷmattaṁ . polakella voḷḷitenippippilavaḷḷada taṭiya geyyiṁ mūḍalsa
le mikkadommava dirppattanālku mattaranittaṁ . vṛttaṁ . bhūvaḷayaṁ karaṁ pogaḷvinaṁ naṟugundada mekkegēri
yoḷbhāviśi vālaya sabāsadana sirivāgilurvvarā dēvagṛha saṁjevaṭavārave bādube śatrasālevaṁ
dēvavinirmmitaṁgaḷene māḍisidīśvaranēṁ kṛtārtthanō . Inajana nuḍi nuḍi gāṁgēyana śaucaṁ śaucamabjabhava
naṟivaṟivindra vīśānanoḷpīśvaraṁge sahajaguṇaṁgaḷ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō ha
rēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇāṁ viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . bahu bhirvvasudhā bhuktā rāja
bhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . dānaṁ vā pāḷanaṁ dēti dānātchrē
yōnupāḷanaṁ . dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pāḷanādacyutaṁpadaṁ . vṛtta . sāmā nyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
kaṁda . baredaṁ [rāma ] sutanādaradiṁda mmallikārjunaṁ sā tirddi baresida sākṣarikaṁ kollurava nāgavāra kavīṁdraṁ .
© Ā satra nālku mattaroḷage pa gadalli nālku mattarkkayya brahmapuriyeṁdu maneyo
ḷage mūvattayva saivabrāhmaṇargge biṭṭaru . © .
Digital edition of SII 18.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
